Package org.eventb.core.ast.extension

Interface IExpressionExtension

All Superinterfaces:
IFormulaExtension
All Known Subinterfaces:
IConstructorExtension, IDestructorExtension, ITypeConstructorExtension
All Known Implementing Classes:
Cond, ConstructorExtension, DefaultPositionApplicationTests.ExpressionExtension, DefaultPositionApplicationTests.PostfixExpressionExtension, DestructorExtension, ExtendedFormulas.AssociativeExpressionExtension, ExtendedFormulas.ExpressionExtension, ExtendedOperators.AssocExt, ExtensionHelper.GenericOperatorExtension, ExtensionHelper.Money, Extensions.CProd, Extensions.Empty, Extensions.FSet, Extensions.Real, Extensions.RealEmpty, Extensions.RealPlus, Extensions.RealZero, Extensions.Union2, Extensions.Union3, ExtensionTranslationTests.Empty, ExtensionTranslationTests.TypeExtension, ExtensionTranslationTests.Weird, TestFactoryCreation.StrangeTypeConstructor, TestFormulaFactory.UnknownExtension, TestTypeChecker.Strange, TypeConstructorExtension
public interface IExpressionExtension extends IFormulaExtension
Common protocol for expression extensions.
Since:
2.0

  • Field Summary

    Fields inherited from interface org.eventb.core.ast.extension.IFormulaExtension

    addCompatibilities, addPriorities, conjoinChildrenWD, getGroupId, getId, getKind, getOrigin, getSyntaxSymbol, getWDPredicate

  • Method Details

    • synthesizeType

      Type synthesizeType(Expression[] childExprs, Predicate[] childPreds, ITypeMediator mediator)
      Computes the type of the extended expression from its given children.
      Parameters:
      childExprs - the child expressions
      childPreds - the child predicates
      Returns:
      the type of the extended expression or null if it is ill-typed or if its type cannot be determined

    • verifyType

      boolean verifyType(Type proposedType, Expression[] childExprs, Predicate[] childPreds)
      Verifies that the given proposed type is coherent with the given children.
      Parameters:
      proposedType - a type proposed for the extended expression
      childExprs - the child expressions
      childPreds - the child predicates
      Returns:
      true iff the proposed type is coherent with the children, false otherwise

    • typeCheck

      Type typeCheck(ExtendedExpression expression, ITypeCheckMediator tcMediator)
      Define type check constraints for the given extended expression. The given type check mediator is intended to be used for creating type variables when needed, and for adding type constraints.
      Parameters:
      expression - the extended expression to type check
      tcMediator - a type check mediator
      Returns:
      the type of the given extended expression (in terms of type variables if needed)

    • isATypeConstructor

      boolean isATypeConstructor()

      Most commonly, this method returns false. Returning true is reserved FOR ADVANCED PURPOSES ONLY.

      Can be true only if this extension is a type constructor, which implies, as a contract for maintaining inner coherence, that the synthesizeType(Expression[], Predicate[], ITypeMediator) method returns a powerset of the parametric type instantiated with this extension and the base type of its children if any.

      Moreover, a type constructor must not take any predicate child. This restriction will be enforced when creating a parametric type with this extension.

      Returns:
      true iff this extension is a type constructor
